title: Easter Service
description: Join us for Sunday Service on campus as we go through the book of John and learn how it applies to our lives!

title: Grad/Prof Relaxation Station
description: In celebration of Graduate and Professional Student Appreciation Week, you are cordially invited to the Relaxation Station. Please join us for an afternoon of massages, crafts, and games. No tickets or preregistration is required, just a valid BUCKID. Entry is first come, first serve.

title: 64th Annual Mack Jr. Lecture Series
description: This year's Mack Lecture will feature Prof. Shannon S. Stahl (University of Wisconsin-Madison), presenting Benzylic C-H Functionalization and Cross-Coupling.

title: Wellness Wednesday: Your Spiritual Compass: Finding Meaning, Purpose, and Peace in Graduate/Professional Student Life
description: Join us for an interactive session where we explore the dimension of Spiritual Wellness – a source of strength rooted in your personal values, beliefs, and connection to purpose. We will share why it's a critical factor for student mental/emotional health and resilience, and provide tangible practices and resources to help you cultivate peace and manage stress.

title: OUAB Quiz Night
description: Join us as grad/prof students get together for a night of trivia and fun! Pre-arranged and impromptu-created teams compete in a night of trivia. Prizes are awarded to the top team of the evening. Check in begins at 5:30 PM.

title: Recent Graduate Series: What to Know Before You Go?
description: Join us for part 1 of a 3-part webinar series designed to help soon-to-be grads navigate life after college. Sessions will prepare students for graduation, transitioning into your career, and managing the post-grad scaries with confidence.

title: Flicks For Free: The Phoenician Scheme
description: Join OUAB in collaboration with the Business Entertainment Club for a movie screening of The Phoenician Scheme.
location: Ohio Union | US Bank Conference Theater

title: Grad Prof Spring Picnic
description: Join us for the OUAB Grad/Prof Spring Picnic! Celebrate the season with an afternoon of delicious food and great company. Enjoy Rodeo games, music, food and drinks. No Registration required, just bring your Buck ID.

title: Dining Hall Crawl
description: Graduating students! Have you ever wanted to relive your underclassmen days of eating in the dining hall? OUAB is hosting the first ever Dining Hall Crawl. This event is first come, first serve.

title: Revive Sunday Worship Service
description: Join us for Sunday Service on campus as we go through the book of John and learn how it applies to our lives!

title: Beyond the Menu: An Evening of Conversation and Ideas
description: The event will feature a speaker-panel focused on accessibility, a service project open-house, and delicious food. It's a great chance to learn more about issues in accessibility and build new connections while playing fun games and entering our fabulous raffle. RSVP at go.osu.edu/beyondthemenu.

title: Graduate Teaching Toolkit: Teaching as a Graduate Student
description: In Graduate Teaching Toolkit, the Drake Institute's workshop series for graduate instructors, we'll explore each step of the course design process. All graduate students, regardless of teaching experience, are welcome to attend.

title: AFNR Spring into Wellness Paint & Pause
description: A 120-minute structured session for students at any level. Sessions include a Peer Support Circle and Expert-Led Guided Practice using painting as a mindfulness tool. No artistic experience required.

title: Recent Graduate Series: 5U25 College to Career Transition
description: Join us for part 2 of a 3-part webinar series designed to help soon-to-be and recent grads navigate life after college. Sessions will prepare students for graduation, transitioning into your career, and managing the post-grad scaries with confidence.

title: Flicks For Free: Wicked: For Good
description: Join OUAB for a movie screening of Wicked: For Good.
location: Ohio Union | US Bank Conference Theater

title: OUAB in the Kitchen
description: Join OUAB in the Instructional Kitchen at the Ohio Union for a chance to cook a meal of your own under the guidance of the Union's own professional chef, Chef Flores. Whether you are a master chef or a novice, there is an OUAB in the Kitchen program for you.

title: 2026 Fashion Production Association Runway Show
description: Our show will be held at the Archie Griffin Ballroom. Doors open at 6:00 PM for a Silent Auction to benefit our designers. The show officially starts at 7:00 PM. Tickets required.

title: Learn Chinese Kickboxing
description: Learn modern Chinese kickboxing, or sanda, with the Wushu Kung Fu Club and US National Team Members. This is a free event open to all students of any experience or fitness level!

title: Revive Sunday Worship Service
description: Join us for Sunday Service on campus as we go through the book of John and learn how it applies to our lives!

title: Wellness Wednesday: The Mandalas of Transition: Creative Grounding for Navigating your Next Chapter
description: Join us for our final Wellness Wednesday session focusing on creative wellness as a tool for stress relief and emotional processing. We will be creating journey mandalas. No artistic experience required!

title: OUAB Quiz Night
description: Join us as grad/prof students get together for a night of trivia and fun! Pre-arranged and impromptu-created teams compete in a night of trivia. Prizes are awarded to the top team of the evening.

title: Flicks For Free: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description: Join OUAB in collaboration with Buckeye Gaming Collective and Women in Gaming for a movie screening of Five Nights at Freddy's 2.
location: Ohio Union | US Bank Conference Theater

title: Revive Sunday Worship Service
description: Join us for Sunday Service on campus as we go through the book of John and learn how it applies to our lives!

title: Spring Candlelight Ceremony
description: All graduating students, their families, and guests are invited to the Commencement Eve Candlelight Ceremony. Light refreshments and music will be available. The ceremony begins promptly at 9:00 PM.
location: Main Oval, Rain Site: Archie Griffin Grand Ball Room

title: Recent Graduate Series: Post Grad Scaries
description: Join us for the final installment of our webinar series designed to help soon-to-be and recent grads navigate life after college. Sessions will prepare students for graduation, transitioning into your career, and managing the post-grad scaries with confidence.
